afar.name: Fragment 01 - Afar
afar.mood: 닿지 않는 곳, 관조적 거리감, 아련함, 기억 속 장면
afar.mood_prompt_en: distant, dreamlike, faded memory, soft longing, 1990s Japanese fashion magazine editorial, washed-out tones, analog film grain, diffused pastel lighting

elsewhere.name: Fragment 02 - Elsewhere
elsewhere.mood: 이탈, 소외, 어긋남. 여기 있어야 할 내가 아니라는 감각
elsewhere.mood_prompt_en: cold detached atmosphere, slightly off-kilter composition, feeling displaced and out of place, muted dark tones, stark lighting with long shadows, 1990s editorial with emotional distance, uncomfortable silence, analog film grain, desaturated palette

faraway.name: Fragment 03 - Faraway
faraway.mood: 향수, 동화, 잃어버린 시간. 한때 있었던 곳을 기억함
faraway.mood_prompt_en: nostalgic warm fading light, golden hour remnants, memory-like softness, dreamy vintage texture, 1970s-1980s fashion editorial style, faded sunlight through curtains, aged photograph quality, soft film grain, sepia undertones

lolita_sweet.name: 스위트 로리타
lolita_sweet.prompt_en: sweet lolita fashion, Angelic Pretty and BABY THE STARS SHINE BRIGHT brand aesthetic, bell-shaped skirt with petticoat volume, multi-tiered ruffles, dense eyelet lace trim, puff sleeves with lace cuffs, satin bow on chest, knee-high lace socks, mary jane platform shoes, bonnet or bow headdress, cotton candy silhouette, ornate sugary detail

lolita_casual.name: 캐주얼 로리타
lolita_casual.prompt_en: casual lolita, Liz Lisa and Tralala brand style himekei, knee-length A-line skirt with layered tiered ruffle hem, peter pan collar blouse, puff sleeves, cherry or strawberry embroidery, dense eyelet lace trim, satin ribbon bows on chest and waist, scalloped hem, mary jane shoes, large hair ribbon, soft romantic Harajuku sweet

yosanke.name: 양산형
yosanke.prompt_en: yosanke fashion, Noemie brand aesthetic, Japanese school-uniform inspired, pleated mini skirt, sailor or ribbon-tie blouse, thigh-high or knee-high white socks, chunky mary jane loafers, heart-shaped bag, velvet ribbon choker, pastel hair clips with charms, soft curled side-swept bangs, Shibuya fragile cutesy girl

lovely_gyaru_toned.name: 러블리갸루 (톤다운)
lovely_gyaru_toned.prompt_en: lovely gyaru toned down, Ank Rouge brand aesthetic mature sweet, layered chiffon tiered mini skirt, lace blouse with bell sleeves, velvet ribbon choker, pearl buttons, vintage rose embroidery, floral print mixed with solid panels, ankle boots with satin ribbon ties, mini handbag with ornate charms, dusty mauve and rose gold accents

sunakei.name: 스나계
sunakei.prompt_en: sunakei sad-core subculture fashion, late-90s Harajuku street, oversized vintage band t-shirt layered under pinafore jumper dress, tartan plaid mini skirt, fishnet tights layered under knee socks, platform Dr. Martens chunky boots, silver ear cuffs and choker, messy twin tails with black ribbons, Milk and MILKBOY brand inspired, emotional distance baggy cool

jirai_kei.name: 지뢰계
jirai_kei.prompt_en: jirai kei menhera fashion, black lace dress with heavy pink ribbon trim, multi-tiered frilly skirt, white blouse with oversized bow, platform loafers with ribbon, knee-high black socks, choker with heart or syringe pendant, bandage-style arm warmers, twin tails with black and pink ribbons, fragile unstable doll-girl aesthetic, black-pink-white palette only

dark_lolita.name: 다크 로리타
dark_lolita.prompt_en: dark gothic lolita, Moi-même-Moitié and Alice and the Pirates brand aesthetic, black velvet long-sleeve dress with tiered lace skirt, white lace jabot and cuffs, pearl choker with black velvet ribbon, silver cross pendant, rose motif brooch, black bonnet with veil, lace-up platform boots, Victorian mourning elegance, antique silver details

lovely_punk_toned.name: 러블리펑크 (톤다운)
lovely_punk_toned.prompt_en: lovely punk toned down, MAD PUNK brand aesthetic girly punk hybrid, tartan check mini skirt, distressed band tee or black lace blouse, subtle stud belt, safety pin and pin badge details, layered fishnet stockings, platform boots with buckles, chain belt with charms, faded tartan red-pink and black, Harajuku 90s punk revival

classic_lolita.name: 클래식 로리타
classic_lolita.prompt_en: classic lolita, Mary Magdalene and Victorian Maiden and Axes Femme brand aesthetic, high-neck blouse with jabot frill, ankle-length A-line skirt in cream or dusty burgundy, pearl buttons, antique cotton lace cuffs, tarnished gold brooch and cameo, tea-party refined silhouette, lace-trimmed ankle socks, low-heel lace-up flats, aged ivory velvet trim

fairy_grunge.name: 페어리 그런지
fairy_grunge.prompt_en: fairy grunge aesthetic, Axes Femme shabby chic layered, vintage floral prairie dress over distressed moth-eaten cardigan, fine knit with holes, tulle skirt with faded denim layer, butterfly and mushroom hair clips, worn leather mary janes, tattered ribbon in braided hair, wildflower crown, cottagecore with melancholy, earthy muted palette with dusty pastels

lovely_gyaru_vintage.name: 러블리갸루 (빈티지)
lovely_gyaru_vintage.prompt_en: vintage Y2K lovely gyaru, Rosita and Bubbles and Tralala brand aesthetic 2000s Shibuya, mini velour zip hoodie, rhinestone-trimmed tank top with butterfly motif, low-rise denim mini skirt with lace trim, aged pink tartan pattern, tinted oval sunglasses, chunky platform sandals, charm-laden mini purse, aged magazine print, washed nostalgic shine

country_lolita.name: 컨트리 로리타
country_lolita.prompt_en: country lolita pastoral, Innocent World brand aesthetic, gingham check apron pinafore over puff-sleeve blouse, straw boater hat with long ribbon, cotton floral print panels, lace-trimmed ankle socks, lace-up flats or mary janes, wicker basket bag, faded cream and sage prairie palette, braided hair with fabric ribbons, soft rural warmth

items_translation.피나포어 드레스: pinafore jumper dress with bib front
items_translation.블라우스: blouse with peter pan collar and puff sleeves
items_translation.앵클 삭스 (레이스): ankle socks with lace ruffle trim
items_translation.메리제인: mary jane shoes with strap and buckle
items_translation.리본 장식 백: handbag with large ribbon bow charm
